title: VerifyResult
description: Email verification and deliverability result from the Wappalyzer /v2/verify endpoint.

email.description: The email address that was verified.

domain.description: Domain portion of the email address.

reachable.description: Overall reachability classification of the email address.

disposable.description: True if the email address belongs to a disposable email provider.

roleAccount.description: True if the email is a role-based account (e.g. info@, support@).

mxValid.description: True if the domain has valid MX records.

connection.description: True if a connection to the mail server was successfully established.

inboxFull.description: True if the mailbox is full and cannot receive new messages.

catchAll.description: True if the domain accepts all email addresses regardless of whether they exist.

deliverable.description: True if the email address is likely to successfully receive email.

disabled.description: True if the email account has been disabled.

syntaxValid.description: True if the email address passes RFC syntax validation.
